name: n8n-workflow-builder
description: The complete n8n workflow toolkit. Build from plain English (/n8n), use Claude as AI agent brain (/n8n-agent), test workflows (/n8n-test), auto-generate docs (/n8n-docs), audit security and best practices (/n8n-audit), manage lifecycle (/n8n-manage), and explore 1,396 nodes (/n8n-browse). Ships with error handling templates, beginner mode, reusable component library, and a 75MB node database.
author: TheSauceSuite
